---
name: New model adapter
about: Propose adding support for a new model provider
title: "[adapter] "
labels: adapter, enhancement
---

**Provider**
Which model service or library?

**SDK / API**
Link to the official SDK or API docs.

**Pricing**
Per-million-token input and output cost in USD, or "local / free" if applicable.

**Authentication**
Environment variable name(s) the adapter should read.

**Example query**
What does a minimal API call against this provider look like?

**Notes**
Any provider-specific quirks (rate limits, content filtering, regional availability).
